sb_prompt: DISCUSS RECENT SOCIAL CHANGES.  HOW IS LIFE IN AMERICA DIFFERENT TODAY COMPARED TO LIVING TENY

ParticipantB: Yes, I think it's so important that we take action to protect our planet and to prioritize sustainability.

ParticipantB: Yes, it's so exciting to be a part of this generation and to see all of these changes happening.
